family_name: Emergency Medicine documentation-only — ED capacity discussion documentation
population: Patients whose capacity for a specific decision at a specific time is questioned; pediatric consent, guardianship, emergencies and mental-health law need separate qualified review.
intended_setting: All clinical settings, including emergency care, but legal application is jurisdiction-specific.
